test.subject: Monize Test Email
test.heading: Monize Test Email
test.body: This is a test email from Monize. If you received this, your email notifications are working correctly.

billReminder.subjectMany: Monize: {{ count }} upcoming bills need attention
billReminder.heading: Upcoming Bill Reminder
billReminder.introOne: You have 1 upcoming bill that needs attention:
billReminder.introMany: You have {{ count }} upcoming bills that need attention:

mortgageReminder.subject: Monize: 1 upcoming mortgage renewal
mortgageReminder.heading: Mortgage Renewal Reminder
mortgageReminder.introOne: You have 1 mortgage with an upcoming term renewal. Contact your lender to discuss renewal options before the term ends:
mortgageReminder.introMany: You have {{ count }} mortgages with an upcoming term renewal. Contact your lender to discuss renewal options before the term ends:

budgetWeeklyDigest.subject: Monize: Your weekly budget summary
budgetWeeklyDigest.heading: Weekly Budget Summary
budgetWeeklyDigest.intro: Here is your weekly budget summary for: {{ budgets }}

budgetMonthlySummary.subject: Monize: Monthly budget summary - {{ period }}
budgetMonthlySummary.subjectPlural: Monize: Monthly budget summary for {{ count }} budgets
budgetMonthlySummary.heading: Monthly Budget Summary
budgetMonthlySummary.intro: Here is your monthly budget summary for the period that just closed:

oidcLink.subject: Monize: Confirm SSO Account Link
oidcLink.heading: Link Your SSO Account
oidcLink.intro: Someone attempted to sign in via SSO with an email that matches your existing Monize account. To link your SSO identity to this account, click the button below:
oidcLink.disclaimer: If you did not initiate this request, you can safely ignore this email. The link expires in 1 hour.

accountLocked.subject: Account Temporarily Locked
accountLocked.heading: Account Temporarily Locked
accountLocked.body1: Your Monize account has been temporarily locked due to multiple failed login attempts. This is a security measure to protect your account.
accountLocked.body2: The lock will expire automatically. If you did not attempt to log in, we recommend resetting your password immediately.

passwordReset.subject: Monize Password Reset
passwordReset.heading: Password Reset Request
passwordReset.intro: We received a request to reset your password. Click the button below to set a new password:
passwordReset.disclaimer: This link will expire in 1 hour. If you did not request a password reset, you can safely ignore this email.

accountInvite.subject: Your Monize account is ready
accountInvite.heading: Your Monize account is ready
accountInvite.intro: An administrator has created a Monize account for you. Click the button below to set your password and sign in:
accountInvite.disclaimer: This link will expire in 24 hours. If you were not expecting this, you can safely ignore this email.

delegateInvite.subject: You have been invited to Monize
delegateInvite.heading: You have been invited to Monize
delegateInvite.intro: {{ owner }} has invited you to access their Monize account as a delegate. Click the button below to set your password and get started:
delegateInvite.disclaimer: This link will expire in 24 hours. If you were not expecting this invitation, you can safely ignore this email.

emergencyAccessReminder.subjectOne: Monize: your account has been inactive for 1 day
emergencyAccessReminder.subjectMany: Monize: your account has been inactive for {{ daysSinceLogin }} days
emergencyAccessReminder.heading: Monize Emergency Access Reminder
emergencyAccessReminder.bodyOne: You have not signed in to Monize for 1 day. If you remain inactive, your designated emergency contacts will be granted full access to your account {{ grantPhrase }}.
emergencyAccessReminder.bodyMany: You have not signed in to Monize for {{ daysSinceLogin }} days. If you remain inactive, your designated emergency contacts will be granted full access to your account {{ grantPhrase }}.
emergencyAccessReminder.footer: Signing in resets the timer. If you no longer want this feature enabled, you can disable it from Settings → Emergency Access.

emergencyAccessGrant.subject: You have been granted emergency access to {{ owner }}'s Monize account
emergencyAccessGrant.heading: Emergency Access Granted
emergencyAccessGrant.body: {{ owner }} previously designated you as an emergency contact on their Monize account. Because they have not signed in for an extended period, you are now being granted full access to take over the account.
emergencyAccessGrant.claimIntro: To claim access, click the link below and set a new password. You will be signed in as the account holder.
emergencyAccessGrant.expiry: This link is valid until {{ expiry }} and can only be used once. If multiple contacts received this email, the first to claim will take over the account.

emergencyAccessGrantRevoked.subject: Monize: emergency access was granted while you were away
emergencyAccessGrantRevoked.heading: Emergency Access Was Granted While You Were Away
emergencyAccessGrantRevoked.body1: Because your account had been inactive, your designated emergency contacts were sent links to take over your account. You have now signed back in, so those links have been revoked and the safeguard has been re-armed.
emergencyAccessGrantRevoked.body2: If this was expected, no action is needed. If you did not expect this, review your sign-in activity and your emergency-access settings.
